ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store was opened */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the department is located */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number where the department is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee (e.g., manager, cashier, stocker) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the employee works */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Job description of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-product relationship */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supply_price" REAL /* Price at which the supplier provides the product */,
  "last_supply_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last supplied */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sale date is a holiday */,
  "predicted_sales" REAL /* Predicted sales for the day */,
  "actual_sales" REAL /* Actual sales for the day */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion, if any */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered by the promotion */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the user is based */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_calendar" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_trends" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
